content: YouTube/TikTok/IG demonetization triggers: copyrighted/trending audio past its license window (YouTube auto-licenses Shorts trending audio only <=60s), gambling-like content restricted from FYF/monetization on TikTok, advertiser-unfriendly content (profanity, violence, hate speech, nudity), and YouTube's 2025+ crackdown on unoriginal/reaction/compilation content without commentary.
